sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_running_accumulate (value Int32) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT value, runningAccumulate(sumState(value)) AS accumulated FROM (SELECT value, sumState(value) AS sumState FROM test_running_accumulate GROUP BY value ORDER BY value);
SELECT runningAccumulate(sumState(value)) AS total_accumulated FROM (SELECT value, sumState(value) AS sumState FROM test_running_accumulate GROUP BY value ORDER BY value);
